name: WLF_LEARN_RELATION_RECORDS
description: Table to store learn organization relation access information.

columns.Name: LEARN_RELATION_RECORD_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier.

columns.Name: LEARN_RELATION_RECORD_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Learn Relation Record Number

columns.Name: RELATION_ID
columns.Comments: Learn organization relation id

columns.Name: LEARN_OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Learn organization object id

columns.Name: LEARN_OBJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Learn organization object type.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person id

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: This column represents status of the learn relation record {ACTIVE, DELETED}.

columns.Name: IN_ELASTIC
columns.Comments: Indicates if access is processed to security index or not

columns.Name: LATEST_PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments: Learning Organization expansion job latest process id

columns.Name: LATEST_PROCESS_DATE
columns.Comments: Learning Organization expansion job latet process date

columns.Name: FIRST_ACTIVATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Date when this participant became Active the first time

columns.Name: STATUS_CHANGE_DATE
columns.Comments: Date of last status transition

columns.Name: ADDED_ON_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the learn relation record active date

columns.Name: REMOVED_ON_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the learn relation record removed date

columns.Name: CREATED_BY_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the person identifier who created the content object.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
